chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَأْمُرُ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 7 – The man orders a man with the killing of a man

text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ عَبْدَهُ أَنْ يَقْتُلَ رَجُلًا فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هَلْ عَبْدُ الرَّجُلِ إِلَّا كَسَوْطِهِ أَوْ كَسَيْفِهِ يُقْتَلُ السَّيِّدُ بِهِ وَ يُسْتَوْدَعُ الْعَبْدُ السِّجْنَ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man who ordered his slave that he should kill a man, so he killed him. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And is a slave of the man anything except like his whip, or like his sword? The master would be killed due to it, and the slave would be left in the prison’.
